privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for suite_crm_env p1_escalation_workflow task by confirming that the CRM environment is synthetically seeded via setup scripts. Verified that the assigned occupation (Support Director) and industry (Telecommunications) match the task description. Confirmed the exact count of 3 stale P1 cases (aged 8, 10, and 14 days), 2 underclassified P2 cases (Walmart and Cisco affecting >500 users), and the explicitly named contamination case 'PDF export font rendering issue for 3 internal users' as strictly enforced by the task scripts and verifier logic.
